$description: yohoho design tokens - a small, honest seed grounded in assets/generate.py. Not a finished token system; distribution tooling is future work.

cyan.description: The hero brand color. Constant in both dark and light modes. The voiceprint wave body and the only accent in functional UI (the ring).

rec.description: REC red. Reserved exclusively for the single record dot on dark. Never used anywhere else.

record-light.description: The record dot on light surfaces.

peak-dark.description: The two brighter ho-ho voiceprint peaks on dark.

peak-light.description: The ho-ho peaks on light. Flips to deep teal so the figure stays legible where the cyan goes soft.

done-dark.description: The neutral done dot (transcript landed) on dark.

panel-black.description: The status panel background. Pitch black; the panel never renders Liquid Glass.

page-dark.description: Dark page ground the mark sits on.

unlit-dark.description: Powered-but-unlit dots of the 9x9 field on dark (~12 percent).

wordmark.usage: Wordmark ONLY. Doto is never used for functional UI text.

ui.description: Functional UI uses native-macOS system type and chrome. Cyan appears only in the ring, never as UI text color.

principles.wink: Anime-pirate wink: Brook's yohoho laugh (One Piece) crossed with the yo-ho-ho sea shanty.
principles.color-discipline: Brand cyan on near-pure black. Red is reserved for the REC dot only.
principles.the-mark: A 9x9 circular dot field. A lit subset reads left-to-right as the product doing its one job: RECORD (one red, the yo) -> the LAUGH (cyan ho-ho peaks, a center-out voiceprint) -> DONE (one neutral dot).
principles.chrome: Native-macOS chrome for functional UI; cyan lives only in the ring.
